sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 41.6g of fat. polyunsaturated fat is one of the better parts of the profile. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.
sections.subtitleText: 41.6g of fat. polyunsaturated fat is one of the better parts of the profile. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 28.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for a seed, you want real nutrient concentration, not just tiny-food hype.
sections.subtitleText: 28.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for a seed, you want real nutrient concentration, not just tiny-food hype.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 17.9g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.
sections.subtitleText: 17.9g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 10% daily value stands out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 198% daily value, calcium at 108% daily value, zinc at 62% daily value stand out most. that is major mineral support.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 198% daily value, calcium at 108% daily value, zinc at 62% daily value stand out most. that is major mineral support.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: tiny food with serious nutrient density because seeds often overperform for their size. easy to sprinkle into meals because that practical versatility matters. usually brings decent fat support because that is one of the category strengths.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: calorie density still stacks up fast because tiny foods can still overshoot fast. real serving sizes are often small because some strong paper numbers are hard to cash out in practice. texture or prep can be a barrier because not everyone uses seeds consistently.

closing.summary: Poppy Seeds has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
